scripts.build: npx @yao-pkg/pkg -t node22-win-x64 index.js -o CasinoBot.exe && node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');execSync('\"'+require('path').join(process.env.APPDATA,'npm/node_modules/rcedit/bin/rcedit-x64.exe')+'\" CasinoBot.exe --set-icon icon.ico --set-version-string FileDescription \"Casino Bonus Monitor\" --set-version-string ProductName \"Casino Bonus Monitor\" --set-version-string LegalCopyright \"(c) glowrius\"',{stdio:'inherit'})"
